justifications.temporal_understanding: The agent correctly interpreted "today+11" and then accurately understood the user's preference for "around 10 AM" and earlier dates.
justifications.negotiation_effectiveness: The agent effectively presented available alternatives and confirmed unavailability for the user's preferred time while still offering the closest suitable option.
justifications.conversational_efficiency: The agent efficiently gathered all necessary information and booked the appointment without any unnecessary turns or redundant questions.
justifications.customer_experience: The interaction was smooth and professional, with the agent providing clear options and successfully booking the desired appointment.
justifications.recovery_quality: The agent maintained full context when the user requested earlier slots and gracefully recovered by confirming the unavailability and reiterating the closest available options.
